subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #041 Universal Cycles
subcodes.first_line: Each of the luminous bodies of this limitless firmament has its cycle of revolution
subcodes.first_line_orig: همچنان که این اجرام نورانیه در این فضای نامتناهی هر یک را دوری زمانیست
subcodes.subjects: @the Adamic cycle and the Baha'i cycle, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion
